PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Continued To Aug-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-30-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May 22, 2014 is admitted to probate. Martha L. Daetwyler and Fiduciary Trust International of California are appointed as the Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 11, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by April 4, 2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: R. Rosada. Not reported.
